title: NIIT is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: NIIT is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
NIIT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT:
NIIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT!
jsonLd.skills: Curriculum Development, Research Skills, Communication Skills, E-learning, Lesson Planning, CBSE/ICSE Standards, Pedagogy, Child Psychology
